mapper.select:
select sys_id, plant_cd, plant_nm, domain_url, email_url_use_yn, email_url, use_yn from sys_plant where 1=1
and ( plant_cd like concat('%', #{searchCond}, '%') or plant_nm like concat('%', #{searchCond}, '%') or domain_url like concat('%', #{searchCond}, '%') )
and delete_yn = 'N' order by plant_cd asc
select sys_id, plant_cd, plant_nm, domain_url, email_url_use_yn, email_url, use_yn from sys_plant where domain_url = #{domainUrl} and use_yn = 'Y' and delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.delete:
update sys_plant set delete_yn = 'Y', modify_datetime = now(), modify_user_id = #{userId} where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_plant ( sys_id, plant_cd, plant_nm, domain_url, email_url, email_url_use_yn, use_yn, delete_yn, insert_datetime, insert_user_id, modify_datetime, modify_user_id ) values ( #{plant.sysId}, #{plant.plantCd}, #{plant.plantNm}, #{plant.domainUrl}, #{plant.emailUrl}, #{plant.emailUrlUseYn}, #{plant.useYn}, 'N', now(), #{userId}, null, null )
mapper.select: select COUNT(*) > 0 from sys_plant where 1=1 and plant_cd = #{plantCd}
mapper.update: update sys_plant set plant_nm = #{plant.plantNm}, domain_url = #{plant.domainUrl}, email_url_use_yn = #{plant.emailUrlUseYn}, email_url = #{plant.emailUrl}, use_yn = #{plant.useYn}, modify_datetime = now(), modify_user_id = #{userId} where 1=1 and sys_id = #{plant.sysId}
mapper.select: select sys_id, plant_cd, plant_nm, domain_url, email_url_use_yn, email_url, use_yn from sys_plant where 1=1 and sys_id = #{sysId}
